About us
Home
About us
DKI srl
is a well-established company in Italy and abroad, specialized in the production of trapezoidal threaded bars and relative nuts, both standard and according to customer projects.
Being in contact with DKI means ensuring the availability of Ex-Stock items, fast deliveries and guarantee of quality products.
DKI
is your ideal partner: proud of a technical department specialized in the study, design and production of any type of special threaded spindle, with delivery times depending on the customer’s request.
The success of DKI has grown day by day thanks to the trust of our customers.

Products
Home
Products
Trapezoidal threaded nuts
Right and left trapezoidal threaded nuts, according to ISO DIN 103, /H tolerance. When required we costumize each special nut on dimensions, design and material grades
Trapezoidal screws
Rolled mandrels with 7e tolerance on the threaded diameter. The standard materials available are: C15 - C45 - Stainless steel A2 / AISI304 - Stainless steel A4 / AISI316. We also produce special material on request. Range of dimensions produce [...]
Product on request
Creation of items on request, based on the specific design of the customer
